message:
test(conformance): add linalg metamorphic wide-QR and fractional-solve cases

Add 2 new linalg metamorphic cases:
- linalg_qr_repeat_deterministic_wide_2x8: wide matrix QR determinism
- linalg_solve_homogeneous_scaling_fractional_2x2: solve with scalar=0.5

Updates linalg metamorphic: 28 → 30 (132 → 134 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
